description: Add task status tracking, updates, and filtering.

userStories.title: Add task status schema and persistence
userStories.description: As a product team, I want each task to store a status so that task progress persists for every task.
acceptanceCriteria: Task schema stores a status field with allowed values pending, in progress, and done
Existing tasks default to pending after migration or backfill
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Allow task status updates
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task status so that I can keep work progress current.
acceptanceCriteria: Task status update action accepts pending, in progress, and done values
Changing status saves the new value for the selected task
Invalid status values are rejected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show task status badges on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to display its current status so that I can scan progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards show a visible badge for pending, in progress, and done statuses
Badge styling differs by status while preserving task readability
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task status controls to task rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want status controls in the task list so that I can update tasks without leaving the list view.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row exposes a status control with pending, in progress, and done options
Changing the control updates the task and refreshes the visible status badge
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on active or completed work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list includes filter options for All, Pending, In Progress, and Done
Selecting a filter updates the visible task list without affecting stored task data
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
